title: Cleanup Function
description: Prevent memory leaks and cancel subscriptions.

slides.title: Cleaning Up After Effects 🧹
Event Listener Example
slides.content: Adding and removing a resize listener:

quizData.question: The cleanup function in useEffect runs only when the component unmounts.
quizData.explanation: It also runs before the effect re-runs (if dependencies change) to clean up the previous effect.
